title: FrameWeb Writer Tool (FWT)
description: Domain-specific language for web modeling with automatic Mermaid diagram generation. Built with Langium in VS Code, supporting the FrameWeb methodology. (Undergraduate thesis project - grade 9.5)

title: AI Practices & Experiments
description: Academic and personal Machine Learning experiments: AutoDiff, Neural Networks, Clustering, and Data Analysis using Jupyter/Colab Notebooks.

title: Vaccine Shell (vsh) - Process & Signal Management
description: Interactive shell simulator in C with advanced signal handling (SIGUSR1/SIGUSR2), zombie process management, and foreground/background execution mimicking real OS behavior.

title: SQL Transaction Conflict Detector
description: PostgreSQL-based system that builds precedence graphs and uses DFS to detect cycles, verifying transaction serializability. Automated with Docker and Makefiles.

title: Doar Computadores API
description: Node.js REST API for managing donations of computers and electronics, handling registration and data storage with Express and TypeScript.

title: Cash-Me Transfer System
description: Backend service for peer-to-peer money transfers with authentication, balance tracking, and PostgreSQL persistence using TypeORM and Docker.
